subject: A gaunt hunched undead or corrupted humanoid creature with chains, looming over a small animal in a dim cavern
description: A tall, emaciated humanoid figure crouches forward in a dark stone cavern. Its body is skeletal and leathery, with chains hanging from one wrist. The figure's face is partially obscured by hanging hair and appears decayed or corrupted, with a purple discoloration around the eye area. Its posture is hunched and predatory. On the cave floor nearby is a small animal — goat-like in shape, lying or cowering. The background reveals a glimpse of a star-speckled sky through an opening, suggesting an underworld-adjacent setting.
foreground: Gaunt chained undead figure hunched over; small goat-like animal on the ground nearby
background: Dark stone cavern; stars visible through an opening
emotion: menace and desperation — creature looms with hollow intensity
